query:
-- Update Spar Balbriggan with Eircode
UPDATE `stores` SET 
  `eircode` = 'K32 Y621',
  `address` = 'Main Street, Balbriggan, Co. Dublin, Ireland'
WHERE `slug` = 'spar-balbriggan';

-- Update Open All Ours with Eircode
UPDATE `stores` SET 
  `eircode` = 'K32 Y622',
  `address` = 'High Street, Balbriggan, Co. Dublin, Ireland'
WHERE `slug` = 'open-all-ours';

-- Hide the other stores
UPDATE `stores` SET `is_active` = false 
WHERE `slug` IN ('apple-green-balbriggan', 'the-hammer', 'millfield-groceries');
